testcase.name: register_Success_ReturnsToken

o.h.e.t.j.p.i.JtaPlatformInitiator : HHH000489: No JTA platform available (set 'hibernate.transaction.jta.platform' to enable JTA platform integration) Hibernate: drop table if exists applications cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists blocks cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists chats cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists documents cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists educations cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists experiences cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists job_preferences cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists jobs cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists languages cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists messages cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists reports cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists skills cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists user_roles cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists users cascade Hibernate: create table applications (applied_at timestamp(6), candidate_id bigint, id bigint generated by default as identity, job_id bigint, cover_letter varchar(255), status varchar(255), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table blocks (blocked_at timestamp(6), blocked_id bigint, blocker_id bigint, id bigint generated by default as identity, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table chats (candidate_id bigint, created_at timestamp(6), id bigint generated by default as identity, job_id bigint, last_message_at timestamp(6), recruiter_id bigint, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table documents (file_size bigint, id bigint generated by default as identity, uploaded_at timestamp(6), user_id bigint, file_name varchar(255), file_path varchar(255), file_type varchar(255), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table educations (end_date date, start_date date, id bigint generated by default as identity, user_id bigint, degree varchar(255), field_of_study varchar(255), school varchar(255), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table experiences (current_job boolean not null, end_date date, start_date date, id bigint generated by default as identity, user_id bigint, company varchar(255), description varchar(255), title varchar(255), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table job_preferences (min_salary integer, id bigint generated by default as identity, user_id bigint unique, job_type varchar(255), mobility_zone varchar(255), remote_preference varchar(255), work_schedule varchar(255), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table jobs (active boolean not null, duration integer, salary_max integer, salary_min integer, created_at timestamp(6), expires_at timestamp(6), id bigint generated by default as identity, recruiter_id bigint, company varchar(255), description TEXT, job_type varchar(255), location varchar(255), remote_policy varchar(255), title varchar(255) not null, work_schedule varchar(255), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table languages (id bigint generated by default as identity, user_id bigint, level varchar(255), name varchar(255) not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table messages (read boolean not null, chat_id bigint, id bigint generated by default as identity, sender_id bigint, sent_at timestamp(6), attachment_name varchar(255), attachment_url varchar(255), content TEXT, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table reports (created_at timestamp(6), id bigint generated by default as identity, reported_user_id bigint, reporter_id bigint, description varchar(255), reason varchar(255), status varchar(255), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table skills (id bigint generated by default as identity, user_id bigint, level varchar(255), name varchar(255) not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table user_roles (user_id bigint not null, roles varchar(255) check (roles in ('ROLE_CANDIDATE','ROLE_RECRUITER'))) Hibernate: create table users (id bigint generated by default as identity, email varchar(255) not null unique, first_name varchar(255), last_name varchar(255), location varchar(255), password varchar(255) not null, phone varchar(255), primary key (id)) Hibernate: alter table if exists applications add constraint FK32iahkg1fqci0pt76uql80nj7 foreign key (candidate_id) references users Hibernate: alter table if exists applications add constraint FK65weib1lru9dkrbto5pv389vi foreign key (job_id) references jobs Hibernate: alter table if exists blocks add constraint testcase.name: login_WrongPassword_ThrowsError
